steps.title: Determine the target meaning
steps.content: The narrator says he did not “concern myself with” his sisters' dolls and giggling, expressing that he did not involve himself in or give attention to their activities. We need a word for: caring about, being occupied with, giving attention to something.

steps.title: Find the matching choice
steps.content:
Care about precisely captures this meaning.

The other three don't fit: Craft describes making things, Get angry about implies emotional conflict rather than indifference, and Earn refers to financial gain.

This matches choice C — C is correct.
